title: Bingo!
body:
_**NOTE:
This plugin will reset your entire world!**_

### What is Bingo?
Bingo is a game where you try to obtain all your objects on the bingo board. Whoever obtains all objects wins.

### Available Objects
- Items
- Entities (need to be killed)
- Biomes
- Structures
- Advancements

### Available Settings (need to be an Operator)
- Toggle Damage
- Toggle PVP
-> Toggle Keep-Inventory
- Toggle the End (Allowing Players to enter the End)
- Toggle the Nether (Allowing Players to enter the Nether)
- Toggle Randomizer (Randomizes the Drops)
- Toggle Enchantments (only available for Items)
- Adjust the time limit
- Adjust the size of the teams
- Adjust the amount of objects on the bingo board
- Select which objects should be on the bingo board (see Available Objects)
- Select the difficulty of the bingo board
- Change the difficulty of each object

### Available Commands
- /backpack (bp) -> Opens the team's backpack
- /spawn -> Teleports you to the spawn
- /top -> Teleports you to the highest block at your location
- /teamchat (teamtell | teammsg) -> Send a message to the team chat
- /bingo -> Show the bingo board

### Localization
To add custom translations, go to `plugins/Bingo/lang`. Copy the `en_us.json` file and rename it to your desired language code (for example, `de_de.json` for German). After restarting the server, the plugin will use the translation automatically when you set your Minecraft client to that language.

If you find bugs or have recommendations, please feel free to report them or share your feedback to help me improve the game.
